---
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css: "style.css"
    number_sections: false
    toc: false
    # change to true for a self-contained document, but it'll be a litte slower for Pandoc to render
    self_contained: false
lot: false # insert a list of tables
lof: false # insert a list of figures
params:
    md_input:
    stats_period: 
    image1:
    image2:
    image3:
# uncomment this line to produce HTML and PDF in RStudio:
knit: pagedown::chrome_print
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = T, echo = F, message = F, warning = F)

library(tidyverse); library(kableExtra); library(formattable); library(ggtext);library(ggrepel)
# ; library(magick)

 # library(ggfittext);
options(knitr.kable.NA = '')
```




```{r, eval=F}
load("stats_period.RData")
md_input <- "24th May 2026 - MD 5 vs Calgary (A)"
date <- stats_period %>% filter(activity_name==md_input) %>% pull(date) %>% unique
```

```{r}
stats_period <- params$stats_period
md_input <- params$md_input
image1 <- params$image1
image2 <- params$image2
image3 <- params$image3
date <- stats_period %>% filter(activity_name==md_input) %>% pull(date) %>% unique

```


```{r, fig.show='hold', out.width="150px"}
knitr::include_graphics("Halifax.png")

team_logo <- case_when(str_detect(md_input, "Montreal") ~ "Montreal.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Ottawa") ~ "Ottawa.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Toronto") ~ "Toronto.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Calgary") ~ "Calgary.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Vancouver") ~ "Vancouver.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Portsmouth") ~ "Portsmouth.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "Everton") ~ "Everton.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "West Ham") ~ "West Ham.png",
                       str_detect(md_input, "AUS") ~ "AUS.png")

knitr::include_graphics("vs.png")
knitr::include_graphics(team_logo)


# knitr::include_graphics(c("Halifax.png", "", team_logo))
# <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; max-height: 50px; page-break-inside: avoid;">
#   <div style="flex: 1;">![](Halifax.png)</div>
#   <div style="flex: 1;">![](`r team_logo`)</div>
# </div>

```


# MATCH REPORT
## Season `r str_extract(date, '\\d{4}')` - Game `r str_extract(md_input, '(?<=MD\\s)\\d{1}')`
### `r paste0(weekdays(date), ', ', format(date, '%B %d, %Y'))`

::: {.force-break}

```{r image1, results='asis'}

# 1. Define your R variable containing the image path or URL
if (is.null(image1)) {
  image1 <- "TidesFCImage2.jpg"}
# image1 <- "TidesFCImage2.jpg"
# image1 <-images$datapath[1]

cat(sprintf('
<style>


/* Create a bulletproof layout div container that holds the image */
.cover-background-wrapper {
  background-image: url("%s") !important;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  /* Force it to fill the entire physical printable page sheet */
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;

  /* Center the header text inside this image canvas */
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
}

.cover-background-wrapper h1 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #ffffff; /* Example: White text to stand out over the image */
  text-shadow: 2px 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); /* Drop shadow for legibility */
}
</style>
', image1))

```


::: {.cover-background-wrapper}
# SQUAD GAME DATA
:::


::: {.force-break}

```{r Match_Day_Summary_Table}


match_day_summary <- stats_period %>% 
  dplyr::filter(activity_name == md_input & str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
  select(activity_name, position_name, athlete_name, period_name, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance, accel_efforts, decel_efforts,max_vel_kph) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x))) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = period_name, names_glue = "{period_name}_{.value}", values_from = c(field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance, accel_efforts, decel_efforts,max_vel_kph)) %>% 
  mutate(Sub = if_else(is.na(`2. First Half_field_time`) | `2. First Half_field_time` < (10*60), T, F)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols=contains(". "), names_to = c("period_name", ".value"), names_pattern = "(\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half)_(.*)") %>% 
  group_by(activity_name, athlete_name, position_name, Sub) %>% 
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric) & !max_vel_kph, ~sum(.x,na.rm=T)), max_vel_kph = max(max_vel_kph, na.rm=T)) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  mutate(`% of HSR + Sprint Distance` = ((high_speed_distance+sprint_distance)/total_distance),
         field_time=field_time/60) %>% 
  relocate(`% of HSR + Sprint Distance`, .before=max_vel_kph) %>% 
  relocate(field_time, .before=total_distance) %>% 
  rename(Match = activity_name, Player = athlete_name, Position = position_name,`Total Distance (m)` = total_distance, `HSR Distance (m)` = high_speed_distance, `Sprint Distance (m)` = sprint_distance, 
         `Accel Efforts (#)` = accel_efforts, `Decel Efforts (#)`=decel_efforts, `Max Speed (km/h)` = max_vel_kph, `Duration (min)` = field_time) %>% 
  arrange(Sub, Position) 


centered_bar <- function(color = "lightgray", fun = "proportion") {
  fun <- match.fun(fun)
  formatter("span",  style = x ~ formattable::style(
    display = "inline-block",
    direction = "ltr",
    width = "100%", # Ensures the container spans the entire column width
    `background-image` = sprintf("linear-gradient(90deg, %s %s, transparent %s)", 
                                 color, percent(fun(as.numeric(x))), percent(fun(as.numeric(x)))),
    `background-repeat` = "no-repeat",
    `background-position` = "center", # Keeps the un-stretched bar centered
    `text-align` = "center"           # Centers the text over the bar
  ))
}


match_day_summary %>%
  mutate(
    Player = ifelse(Sub == T,
                  cell_spec(Player,format="html", background = rgb(229, 225, 230,0.8*255,maxColorValue = 255),
                            extra_css = paste0(
                              "display: inline-block; ",
                              "directionn: ltr; ",
                              "border-radius: 0; ",
                              "width: 100%;"
                              )),
                  cell_spec(Player,format="html", background = "white",
                            extra_css = paste0(
                              "display: inline-block; ",
                              "directionn: ltr; ",
                              "border-radius: 0; ",
                              "width: 100%;"
                              ))),
     across(contains("Distance (m)") | contains("Efforts (#)"), ~ (.x/max(.x))*100, .names="{.col} per max"),
   `Total Distance (m)` = centered_bar(rgb(87, 44, 95,0.5*255,maxColorValue = 255))(round(`Total Distance (m)`)),
    `HSR Distance (m)` = centered_bar(rgb(0, 176, 185,0.5*255,maxColorValue = 255))(round(`HSR Distance (m)`)),
    `Sprint Distance (m)` = centered_bar(rgb(87, 44, 95,0.5*255,maxColorValue = 255))(round(`Sprint Distance (m)`)),
    `Accel Efforts (#)` = centered_bar(rgb(0, 176, 185,0.5*255,maxColorValue = 255))(round(`Accel Efforts (#)`)),
    `Decel Efforts (#)` = centered_bar(rgb(87, 44, 95,0.5*255,maxColorValue = 255))(round(`Decel Efforts (#)`)),
    `% of HSR + Sprint Distance` = percent(`% of HSR + Sprint Distance`, digits=2)
  ) %>%
  select(!Position & ! Match & ! Sub & !contains("per max")) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, booktabs = T,linesep = '\\addlinespace', digits = c(0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,1),align = 'lcccccccc') %>% 
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "basic", full_width = T, position = "center")%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "168px")


```



::: {.force-break}


#### OVERALL HALF COMPARISON



```{r distance_per_half,  fig.width=9,fig.height=6, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_per_half <- stats_period %>% 
  filter(position_name != "Goal Keeper" & activity_name == md_input & str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
  select(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x)),
         period_name=str_remove(period_name, "\\d{1,2}\\.\\s")) %>% 
  group_by(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name) %>% 
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  group_by(activity_name, date, period_name) %>% 
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>% 
  ungroup %>%
  mutate(across(c(high_speed_distance, sprint_distance), ~.x*20)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols=contains("distance"), names_to = "Type", values_to = "Distance") %>% 
  mutate(Type=factor(Type, levels=c("total_distance", "high_speed_distance", "sprint_distance")), 
         Distance_labels = if_else(Type != "total_distance", round(Distance/20), round(Distance)))

md_distance_per_half %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=period_name, y=Distance))+
  geom_col(aes(fill=Type), position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
    geom_text(aes(group =Type, label =Distance_labels),size=3.5, vjust = 2, color="white", position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Total Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)), sec.axis = sec_axis(~./20, name="HSR / Sprint Distance (m)"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"),labels = c("Total Distance", "HSR Distance", "Sprint Distance"))+ 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )
  
```


::: {.force-break}





```{r}
md_distance_by_player <- stats_period %>%
  dplyr::filter(position_name != "Goal Keeper" & activity_name == md_input & str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
  select(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x)),
         period_name=str_remove(period_name, "\\d{1,2}\\.\\s")) %>%
  group_by(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name) %>%
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>%
  ungroup %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !field_time, ~.x/(field_time/60), .names="{.col}_per_min"))


```


#### Total Distance and Total Distance/Min By Player (per half)


```{r md_by_player_total_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = total_distance, fill = period_name, label=round(total_distance)))+
  geom_col()+
  geom_text(position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),color="white", size=3)+
   labs(x=NULL, y ="Total Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
   theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),

    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
    legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt") 
 )
    
  
    
```



```{r md_by_player_total_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = total_distance_per_min))+
  geom_col(aes(fill = period_name),position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
    geom_text(aes(group =period_name,label=round(total_distance_per_min)),size=3, vjust = -0.5, color="white", position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
   labs(x=NULL, y ="Total Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
   theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
   axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
    legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt") 
 )
    
  
    
```


::: {.force-break}

#### High Speed Running Distance and HSR Distance/Min By Player (per half)



```{r md_by_player_hsr_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = high_speed_distance, fill = period_name, label=round(high_speed_distance)))+
  geom_col()+
      # geom_text_repel(position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),segment.colour = NA, direction = "y", size=3,seed=42,color="white") +
  geom_text(position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),color="white", size=3)+
   labs(x=NULL, y ="HSR Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
   theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
   axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
    legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt") 
 )

```

```{r md_by_player_hsr_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}


md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = high_speed_distance_per_min))+
  geom_col(aes(fill = period_name),position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
    geom_text(aes(group =period_name,label=round(high_speed_distance_per_min,2)),size=3, vjust = -0.5, color="white", position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
   labs(x=NULL, y ="HSR Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
   theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
   axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
    legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt") 
 )
    
  
```


::: {.force-break}


#### Sprint Distance and Sprint Distance/Min By Player (per half)



```{r md_by_player_sprint_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = sprint_distance, fill = period_name, label=round(sprint_distance)))+
  geom_col()+
  # geom_bar_text(position = "stack", grow=T, reflow = T,contrast=T, colour="white") +
  # geom_text_repel(position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),segment.colour = NA, direction = "y", size=3,seed=42,color="white") +
  geom_text(position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),color="white", size=3)+
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Sprint Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
      # scale_color_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal", panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
   axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
 legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt") 
 )
```


```{r md_by_player_sprint_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=2.8, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_by_player %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = str_extract(athlete_name,"(?<=\\s)[[:graph:]]+$"), y = sprint_distance_per_min))+
  geom_col(aes(fill = period_name),position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
    geom_text(aes(group =period_name,label=round(sprint_distance_per_min,2)),size=3, vjust = -0.5, color="white", position=position_dodge2(width=0.9,preserve = "single")) +
   labs(x=NULL, y ="Sprint Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
   theme_bw()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)))+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00B0B9","#572C5F"))+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",legend.direction = "horizontal",panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
   axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", size=8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white"),
    
    legend.key.size = unit(8, "pt")
 )
    
```


::: {.force-break}


```{r image2, results='asis'}

# 1. Define your R variable containing the image path or URL

if (is.null(image2)) {
  image2 <- "TidesFCImage3.jpg"}
# image2 <- images$datapath[2]


cat(sprintf('
<style>

/* Create a bulletproof layout div container that holds the image */
.cover-background-wrapper2 {
  background-image: url("%s") !important;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  /* Force it to fill the entire physical printable page sheet */
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;

  /* Center the header text inside this image canvas */
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
}

.cover-background-wrapper2 h1 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #ffffff; /* Example: White text to stand out over the image */
  text-shadow: 2px 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); /* Drop shadow for legibility */
}
</style>
', image2))

```

::: {.cover-background-wrapper2}
# MATCH DAY COMPARISON
:::


::: {.force-break}

```{r}

md_distance_team_total <- stats_period %>%
  dplyr::filter(position_name != "Goal Keeper" & tag_name == "MD" & date >= as.Date("2026-04-01") & date <= (stats_period %>% filter(activity_name == md_input) %>% pull(date) %>% unique) & str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
  select(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x))) %>%
  group_by(activity_name, date) %>%
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>%
  ungroup %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !field_time, ~.x/(field_time/60), .names="{.col}_per_min"),
         logo = case_when(str_detect(activity_name, "Montreal") ~"Montreal.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Ottawa") ~ "Ottawa.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Toronto") ~ "Toronto.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Calgary") ~ "Calgary.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Vancouver") ~ "Vancouver.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Portsmouth") ~ "Portsmouth.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "Everton") ~ "Everton.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "West Ham") ~ "West Ham.png",
                       str_detect(activity_name, "AUS") ~ "AUS.png")) %>% 
  arrange(date) %>% 
  mutate(date=factor(date, levels = unique(date), labels = format(date, "%b %d")),
         Group="group",
         logo=paste0("<img src='", logo,  "' height='20' />"))

md_distance_desc <- md_distance_team_total %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~mean(.x), .names="{.col}_mean"), 
         across(where(is.numeric) & !contains("_mean"), ~sd(.x), .names="{.col}_sd")) %>% 
  select(contains("mean") | contains("sd")) %>% 
  unique

```


```{r md_comparison_total_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}


md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total_distance)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_mean-2*md_distance_desc$total_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_mean+2*md_distance_desc$total_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(total_distance)), vjust=-2, color="white") + 
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Total Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


    

    
```



```{r md_comparison_total_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}


md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total_distance_per_min)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_per_min_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_per_min_mean-2*md_distance_desc$total_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$total_distance_per_min_mean+2*md_distance_desc$total_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(total_distance_per_min)), vjust=-2, color="white") + 
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Total Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


    

    
```

::: {.force-break}

```{r md_comparison_hsr_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y =high_speed_distance )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_mean-2*md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_mean+2*md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(high_speed_distance)), vjust=-2, color="white") + 
  labs(x=NULL, y ="HSR Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


```



```{r md_comparison_hsr_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}


md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = high_speed_distance_per_min)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_per_min_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_per_min_mean-2*md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_per_min_mean+2*md_distance_desc$high_speed_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(high_speed_distance_per_min,2)), vjust=-2, color="white") + 
  labs(x=NULL, y ="HSR Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


    

    
```

::: {.force-break}

```{r md_comparison_sprint_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y =sprint_distance )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_mean-2*md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_mean+2*md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(sprint_distance)), vjust=-2, color="white") +
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Sprint Distance (m)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


```


```{r md_comparison_sprint_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}


md_distance_team_total %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y =sprint_distance_per_min)) +
   geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_per_min_mean, color="#00B0B9", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_per_min_mean-2*md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_per_min_mean+2*md_distance_desc$sprint_distance_per_min_sd, color="red", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(group=Group), color="white")+
  geom_richtext(aes(label=logo),fill = NA, label.color = NA) + 
  geom_text(aes(label=round(sprint_distance_per_min,2)), vjust=-2, color="white") + 
  labs(x=NULL, y ="Sprint Distance per Min (m/min)",fill=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill ="transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.2)))


    

    
```


::: {.force-break}



```{r image3, results='asis'}

# 1. Define your R variable containing the image path or URL
if (is.null(image3)) {
  image3 <- "TidesFCImage4.jpg"}
# image3 <- "TidesFCImage4.jpg"
# image3 <- images$datapath[3]


cat(sprintf('
<style>

/* Create a bulletproof layout div container that holds the image */
.cover-background-wrapper3 {
  background-image: url("%s") !important;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  /* Force it to fill the entire physical printable page sheet */
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;

  /* Center the header text inside this image canvas */
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
}

.cover-background-wrapper3 h1 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #ffffff; /* Example: White text to stand out over the image */
  text-shadow: 2px 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); /* Drop shadow for legibility */
}
</style>
', image3))

```

::: {.cover-background-wrapper3}
# DISTANCE ACROSS THE MATCH
:::


::: {.force-break}


```{r 15min_distance}

md_distance_15min_temp <- stats_period %>%
  filter(position_name != "Goal Keeper" & activity_name == md_input & str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
  select(activity_name, date, athlete_name, period_name,start_time, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x))) %>%
  group_by(activity_name, date, period_name, start_time) %>%
  summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>%
  ungroup %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !field_time, ~.x/(field_time/60), .names="{.col}_per_min")) %>% 
  arrange(start_time) %>% 
  mutate(
    # period_name = paste(str_remove(period_name, "\\d{1,2}\\.\\s"), (row_number()-1)*(90/n()), "-", row_number()*(90/n()), "min"),
    period=paste0((row_number()-1)*(90/n()), "-", row_number()*(90/n()), "min"),
    position_name="All", 
    across(contains("distance")& !contains("per_min"), ~.x/10))


 md_distance_15min_by_position <- stats_period %>%
      dplyr::filter(position_name != "Goal Keeper" & activity_name == md_input &  str_detect(period_name, "^\\d{1,2}\\. [[:alpha:]]{5,6} Half$")) %>%
      select(activity_name, date, athlete_name, position_name, period_name,start_time, field_time, total_distance, high_speed_distance, sprint_distance) %>%
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~if_else(field_time == 0 & total_distance == 0, NA_real_, .x)),
             position_name = if_else(str_detect(position_name, "Back"), "Defender", position_name), 
             position_name = if_else(str_detect(position_name, "Midfielder"), "Midfielder", position_name),
             position_name = if_else(str_detect(position_name, "Winger") | str_detect(position_name, "Striker") , "Attacker", position_name)) %>%
      group_by(activity_name, date, period_name, start_time, position_name) %>%
      summarize(across(where(is.numeric), ~sum(.x,na.rm=T))) %>%
      ungroup %>% 
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !field_time, ~.x/(field_time/60), .names="{.col}_per_min")) %>% 
      arrange(start_time) %>% 
      group_by(position_name) %>% 
      mutate(
        # period_name = paste(str_remove(period_name, "\\d{1,2}\\.\\s"), (row_number()-1)*(90/n()), "-", row_number()*(90/n()), "min"),
        period=paste0((row_number()-1)*(90/n()), "-", row_number()*(90/n()), "min"),
    across(contains("distance") & !contains("per_min"), ~if_else(position_name == "Defender",.x/4,.x/3))) %>% 
      ungroup 
 
md_distance_15min <- rbind(md_distance_15min_temp, md_distance_15min_by_position) 

 
```

```{r 15min_total_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=6, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_15min %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=total_distance, color=position_name)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
  labs(x=NULL, y="Total Distance (m)", color=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))

   
```

```{r 15min_total_distance_per_min, fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}
# 
# md_distance_15min %>% 
# ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=total_distance_per_min, color=position_name)) +
#   geom_point()+
#   geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
#   labs(x=NULL, y="Total Distance per Min (m/min)", color=NULL)+
#   theme_bw()+
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
#     panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     
#     # Make all text white
#     text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     
#     # Make gridlines white
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
#     
#     # Make borders and axis lines white
#     panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
#     axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
#  )+
#   scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))

   
```

::: {.force-break}


```{r 15min_hsr_distance,  fig.width=9,fig.height=6, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_15min %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=high_speed_distance, color=position_name)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
  labs(x=NULL, y="HSR Distance (m)", color=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))

   
```


```{r 15min_hsr_distance_per_min, fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}
# 
# md_distance_15min %>% 
# ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=high_speed_distance_per_min, color=position_name)) +
#   geom_point()+
#   geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
#   labs(x=NULL, y="HSR Distance per Min (m/min)", color=NULL)+
#   theme_bw()+
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
#     panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     
#     # Make all text white
#     text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     
#     # Make gridlines white
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
#     
#     # Make borders and axis lines white
#     panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
#     axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
#  )+
#   scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))

   
```


::: {.force-break}


```{r 15min_sprint_distance, fig.width=9,fig.height=6, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}

md_distance_15min %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=sprint_distance, color=position_name)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
  labs(x=NULL, y="Sprint Distance (m)", color=NULL)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    
    # Make all text white
    text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
    
    # Make gridlines white
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Make borders and axis lines white
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
 )+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))

   
```


```{r 15min_sprint_distance_per_min,  fig.width=9,fig.height=3, dev = "svg", dev.args = list(bg = "transparent")}
# 
# md_distance_15min %>% 
# ggplot(aes(x=factor(period), y=sprint_distance_per_min, color=position_name)) +
#   geom_point()+
#   geom_line(aes(group=position_name))+
#   labs(x=NULL, y="Sprint Distance per Min (m/min)", color=NULL)+
#   theme_bw()+
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction="horizontal",
#     panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#     
#     # Make all text white
#     text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     axis.text = element_text(colour = "white"),
#     
#     # Make gridlines white
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
#     
#     # Make borders and axis lines white
#     panel.border = element_rect(colour = "white", fill = "transparent"),
#     axis.line = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white"),
#     axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "white")
#  )+
#   scale_color_manual(values=c("red", "#00B0B9","#572C5F","#B2C9D4"))
# 
#    
```
